name: brand-studio
description: BUILD YOUR BRAND — install it, run start-here, answer three short questions about yourself, and get a full personal brand pack built into a folder you choose: brand sheet, brand voice, a polished design system (auto-picked from six presets), a marketing email, a branded carousel, and a self-contained HTML landing page. Nothing to download or attach. Bundles a start-here orchestrator plus skills for voice, design-system, email, carousel, video, and landing page, two sub-agents, slash commands, and an image/video connector. Carries no brand of its own — it builds yours.
